prompt: Create a terrifying cinematic microscopic visualization of Hantavirus inside a human airway or blood vessel, as if seen through an electron microscope blended with dark fantasy medical concept art. Show exactly 9 visible spherical virus particles: 2 large sharply focused foreground virions, one on the lower left tissue ridge and one on the lower right tissue ridge; 1 medium virion floating near the upper center; 1 medium virion near the upper right edge; 1 blurred virion at the upper middle background; 1 small blurred virion at mid left; 1 small blurred virion near center right; 1 medium blurred virion in the central background; and 1 tiny distant virion in the left background. Each virion has a rough mottled membrane, a glowing teal-green spiral core, and many short orange-red club-shaped surface spikes. The environment is a wet organic tunnel made of red swollen tissue cells, translucent membranes, vein-like strands, mucus, and glossy fluid, with golden infectious particles drifting through the air. Use dramatic macro depth of field, strong backlighting from the upper left, amber volumetric glow, high contrast red and gold color grading, extreme biological detail, unsettling horror atmosphere, photorealistic 3D render quality, shallow focus, bokeh, no text, no labels, no humans.
